title: rEvangelion
wikitext:
[]: rEvangelion             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Thu Nov 10, 2005 4:28 pm Here's an Evangelion remix. It's pretty good, listen to the second to last one: http://www.soundclick.com/bands/pagemusic.cfm?bandID=188241

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Wed Dec 07, 2005 4:22 pm Doesn't nobody like it...?

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Wed Dec 07, 2005 4:30 pm To say it's shit would be an insult to all the feces in the world.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Wed Dec 07, 2005 4:38 pm Space Penis wrote: To say it's shit would be an insult to all the feces in the world.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Thu Dec 08, 2005 4:46 pm Good thing I didn't make it or I'd be crushed.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 08, 2005 11:11 pm I think Dj Jinnai is a fairly competent remixer. I really like his Hemisphere remix.

[]:             Quote Post by Hand of God » Fri Dec 09, 2005 6:54 pm TOO LONG AND REPETITIVE (damn long time no post)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Dec 09, 2005 9:19 pm Hand of God wrote: TOO LONG AND REPETITIVE (damn long time no post)

[]:             Quote Post by Hand of God » Fri Dec 09, 2005 10:41 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Hand of God wrote: TOO LONG AND REPETITIVE (damn long time no post)

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Sun Dec 11, 2005 1:32 am Anyone else can't help but laughing through it?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 11, 2005 1:49 am Hand of God wrote: I'm not that much into tehcno

[]:             Quote Post by cubber » Sun Dec 11, 2005 4:04 pm i didn't like the song either...actually, the only soundtrack i would listen to is the "cruel angel thesis"(the intro song), the outro song (fly me to the moon) wouldn't be bad if it wasn't broken english

[]:             Quote Post by Xanatose » Sun Dec 11, 2005 6:49 pm I felt that several of the remixes were at least, as Monkey commented, competent. I particuarlly liked the GITS: SAC remix. However, the Evangelion remix left much to be desired. I forgive this on the basis that there isn't much quality there to begin with. Save a few pockets of quality, the Eva OST is largely a wasteland.

[]:             Quote Post by Punio4 » Mon Dec 12, 2005 6:25 am it's... decent... not that i would listen to it often, but, its not THAT bad...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Dec 12, 2005 7:14 am I like the prospect of remixes. I've been of the mind that a good remix can make you like a peice of music that you previously disliked. And as I'm generally indifferent or annoyed by a lot of the music in Eva, I would like to hear remixes of the various tracks. I have this one awesome trance-like remix of Cruel Angel's Thesis, I love it.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Mon Dec 12, 2005 7:40 am although I don't like techno music, I like this track :) (p.s. I love the decisive battle track)

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Tue Dec 13, 2005 5:01 pm cubber wrote: the outro song (fly me to the moon) wouldn't be bad if it wasn't broken english

[]:             Quote Post by cubber » Wed Dec 14, 2005 6:34 pm Space Penis wrote: cubber wrote: the outro song (fly me to the moon) wouldn't be bad if it wasn't broken english
summary:

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Wed Dec 07, 2005 4:22 pm Doesn't nobody like it...?
